name: germa-search
description: AI-powered Google Dorks extension for precise search results

scripts.build:clean: rm -rf build dist && npm run build
scripts.dev: npm run setup && echo 'Extension ready for development!'
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const api=fs.readFileSync('api.js','utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('api.js', api.replace(/this\.developmentApiKey = '[^']*';/, '// this.developmentApiKey = \'YOUR_KEY_HERE\';'));"

author: atrey.dev
